text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer isn't feeling well, so I take her to
the infirmary...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. A little snooze and I'll be good as
new... Probably, anyway! See you later!

text_block_list.name: Party Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, one and all. I hope you're all having a
good time.

text_block_list.name: Party Organizer
text_block_list.text:
For our next event, we have prepared a special
game of tag for you to enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Tag? At a party?

text_block_list.name: Party Organizer
text_block_list.text:
The rules are quite simple. All you must do is
escape from the large number of monsters we will
be letting loose in the venue.

text_block_list.name: Gadfly Monster
text_block_list.text: Smack, smack! Hungy! Food!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, those gadflies are mega-sized! Just
looking at them is making my skin itch and burn!

text_block_list.name: Party Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Make it outside before time expires, and victory
is yours! Ready... Go!

text_block_list.name: Gadfly Monster
text_block_list.text: Bzzzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ack! Here they come! All-out sprinting's not
gonna be enough to get away from them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But if it's one thing I have full confidence in, it's
my ability to run away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No matter the dilemma I'm facing, I always get
away!

text_block_list.name: Gadfly Monster
text_block_list.text: BWAAAH?! BRAGH?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! That was sure a dream and a half...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But that running style wasn't half bad... I think I'll
try it out in my next training session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer has a bizarre dream, but getting to
run fast and free in it helps lift her spirits,
allowing her to go back to her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Gadfly Monster
text_block_list.text:
You planning to go all out, huh? Guess I'll call
everyone over, then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uh, who's "everyone"?

text_block_list.name: Gadfly Monster
text_block_list.text:
Great-Grandpappy! Great-Great-Grandmama!
Uncle, aunties, and everyone else! C'mon!

text_block_list.name: Gadfly Monster
text_block_list.text: Dinner's seeerved!

text_block_list.name: Gadfly Monster Family
text_block_list.text: Bzzzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Agh! It was just a dream!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aw geez... Time to up my training so no gadflies
can ever catch me, either in my dreams or real
life!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After having such a strange dream, Mejiro
Palmer's condition remains as poor as before...
